overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), starting in a covered walkway with debris and exiting onto a street with holographic advertisements, police vehicles, and pedestrians, eventually moving through an open intersection beneath an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with metal scaffolding and abandoned furniture

events.description: approaching the exit, natural light from outside becomes visible through the rain
exits the covered walkway into the open rainy street

agents.ego_description: walking through a debris-filled covered corridor with metal scaffolding, heading toward the rainy street exit

entered.detail: tall metal gate structure with horizontal bars blocking the exit
worn red velvet sofa left on the wet concrete floor
black and orange vending machine with warning symbols
reflective glass facade with condensation and rain streaks
scattered trash and cardboard boxes on the wet ground

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow covered walkway with metal scaffolding gates ahead. A red abandoned couch and vending machine sit on the left, while debris litters the wet concrete floor. The camera walks forward toward the exit where heavy rain and palm trees become visible outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with overhead holographic advertising banners

events.description: futuristic police car parked on the left sidewalk with officers standing nearby
slight turn to follow the sidewalk curve while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-soaked sidewalk beneath colorful holographic banners, passing a parked police vehicle and approaching distant pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic police car parked on the sidewalk with two officers standing nearby

entered.detail: large curved holographic displays with shifting rainbow colors spanning across the street
tall brass-colored lamp post with ornate design
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
tall palm tree visible down the street in the rain

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens onto a futuristic city street with heavy rain. Colorful holographic advertising banners arc overhead. A police car is parked on the left sidewalk near a glass building facade. The camera continues walking forward, passing street lamps and digital billboards while distant pedestrians approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance area with stairs leading to covered walkway

events.description: passing a pedestrian with an umbrella walking in the opposite direction
turning right toward the elevated highway underpass, leaving the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: approaching a building entrance with concrete stairs, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella, then turning right toward an underpass

notable_agents.action: person holding an umbrella walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete steps leading up to a building entrance with glass canopy
red and white striped concrete barriers near the stairs
massive concrete and steel overpass with green railings spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the sidewalk approaching a building entrance with concrete stairs and barriers. A pedestrian with an umbrella passes by in the opposite direction. The camera then turns right, moving away from the building toward a large elevated highway structure that spans the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection beneath elevated highway with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: futuristic vehicle drives past through the wet intersection
continuing straight through the open intersection toward distant traffic lights

agents.ego_description: moving through the open intersection beneath the elevated highway, navigating around passing vehicles on the rain-soaked pavement

notable_agents.action: futuristic brown car driving through the wet intersection from right to left

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in purple and white graffiti tags
tall pole with traffic signals and surveillance equipment
tall cylindrical tower with the number 08 visible, fading into the rainy haze
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a wide open intersection beneath the massive elevated highway structure. The ground is wet asphalt with crosswalk markings. Graffiti-covered walls line the left side while futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection. In the distance, a tall skyscraper fades into the rainy haze as the camera continues forward through the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, debris-strewn corridor into the expansive, rain-soaked scale of a futuristic metropolis. It begins within a narrow covered walkway, passing an abandoned red couch and vending machine before moving toward the exit where palm trees and heavy rain emerge. As the camera steps outside, the environment opens into a vibrant city street characterized by colorful holographic banners and a parked police car beside a glass facade. The scene then shifts as the camera passes a pedestrian with an umbrella and turns away from a concrete building entrance, heading toward a massive overhead highway. Finally, the movement leads into a wide open intersection of wet asphalt and graffiti-covered walls, where futuristic vehicles pass beneath the highway structure and a distant skyscraper fades into the rainy haze.
